project_type: TypeScript monorepo - 16 Next.js 15 frontends, Fastify 5 backends, 78 shared packages, 8 infrastructure services
build_system: pnpm 10 + Turborepo 2. Tasks: build, typecheck, test, lint. All run via 'pnpm turbo <task>'
test_framework: Vitest 2 with per-package test files (src/__tests__/ or inline *.test.ts)
verification_instructions: Run pnpm turbo typecheck && pnpm turbo build && pnpm turbo test && pnpm turbo lint to verify all 100+ packages
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full npm/docker access. Node 22 default. pnpm 10 already installed.
contribution_requirements: All packages must pass typecheck, build, test, lint. Use workspace:* for internal deps. Standard package pattern: package.json with build/typecheck/test/lint scripts, src/index.ts barrel export, tsconfig.json extending root.
key_patterns: Package pattern: src/index.ts barrel, src/__tests__/*.test.ts for tests, types.ts for type defs. Security package already has CSRF, API keys, session, encryption. Queue package uses BullMQ+ioredis. Existing next.config files have security headers. Root tsconfig already has noUnusedLocals/noUnusedParameters enabled.
directory_structure: apps/ (16 frontend apps), packages/ (78 shared libs), services/ (8 infra services), docs/ (existing partial docs), infra/ (k8s/helm), docker/ (compose configs), scripts/ (tooling), e2e/ (playwright tests), k6/ (load tests)
